description_long: This lamp features a tall, slender metallic base with a circular foot for stability, rising to support a wide, faceted beige fabric lampshade. The base is adorned with decorative brass or gold-toned elements, including a series of coiled rings and a vertical rod, giving it a unique, almost musical-instrument-inspired appearance. The lampshade is slightly flared and polygonal, providing a soft diffusion of light. The lamp's metallic components have a polished, reflective finish, contrasting with the matte texture of the fabric shade. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces. The lamp is likely powered by an internal electrical system, with a single bulb housed beneath the shade.
description: A tall, metallic lamp with a faceted beige fabric shade and decorative gold-toned coils on the base, blending elegance and functionality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth metallic base and the full, symmetrical shape of the beige lampshade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the decorative coiled rings and vertical rod on the lamp's base, adding visual interest.
description_view_2: Rear view with the metallic base visible and the lampshade's polygonal facets clearly defined.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the coiled rings and the lamp's sturdy circular foot.
